name: ION-15743 DW5/Jetty12 Booking Upgrade Issues
description: Tracking compilation and runtime issues when upgrading commons to 1.0.24-SNAPSHOT (DW5 + Jetty 12) in the booking module

entries.summary: Completed fixes for DW5/Jetty12 upgrade in booking module (commons 1.0.23→1.0.24-SNAPSHOT)
entries.detail:
## Changes Made (BUILD SUCCESS)

1. **MessageSupport.java**: Replaced `com.sun.el.ExpressionFactoryImpl` with `ExpressionFactory.newInstance()` — GlassFish EL impl class no longer available in DW5.

2. **jackson-annotations removed**: Was pinned at 2.18.1, conflicting with jackson-databind 2.21.0 from DW5. Now comes transitively from DW5.

3. **jackson-module-afterburner removed**: Zero code usage in booking. DW5 uses blackbird. Was also excluded from shade JAR. Removing this eliminated the direct dep.

4. **hystrix-dropwizard-bundle → hystrix-core**: Only `com.netflix.hystrix.HystrixCommand` and related core classes used. The bundle pulled in hystrix-serialization → afterburner:2.7.5 which caused `NoSuchMethodError: SettableBeanProperty.<init>` at runtime (incompatible with Jackson 2.21.0).

5. **Jackson versions aligned**: jsonSchema and dataformat-xml updated from 2.18.1 to 2.21.0.

6. **AWSUtil.java deleted**: Referenced AWS SDK v1 classes, breaking Lombok annotation chain.

## Remaining Issues (NOT fixed)

1. **AwsRegionProvider NoClassDefFoundError at runtime**: `aws-signing-request-interceptor:0.0.22` (from cloud-sdk-aws) pulls `aws-java-sdk-core:1.10.19` which wins Maven conflict over 1.12.721. This ancient version lacks AwsRegionProvider. **Needs commons fix.**

2. **ElasticsearchConfig.getMaxRetries()**: New abstract method in commons interface needs override in booking.

3. **AWS SDK v1 CollectionUtils**: Used in OutboundServiceImpl.java and MigrationLogic.java — trivially replaceable.

entries.summary: BLOCKER: aws-java-sdk-core:1.10.19 version conflict from cloud-sdk-aws causes AwsRegionProvider NoClassDefFoundError
entries.detail:
Root cause: `vc.inreach.aws:aws-signing-request-interceptor:0.0.22` (used in cloud-sdk-aws for Elasticsearch request signing) declares `com.amazonaws:aws-java-sdk-core:1.10.19`. Maven nearest-first resolution picks this ancient version over 1.12.721/1.12.730 from other deps. Version 1.10.19 predates the `com.amazonaws.regions.AwsRegionProvider` class.

This must be fixed in mercury-services-commons cloud-sdk-aws module — either:
1. Exclude aws-java-sdk-core from aws-signing-request-interceptor
2. Add dependencyManagement to force aws-java-sdk-core:1.12.721+
3. Replace aws-signing-request-interceptor with modern AWS SDK v2 signing

entries.summary: Model: Claude Opus 4.6 via GitHub Copilot
entries.detail: Agent: GitHub Copilot using Claude Opus 4.6

entries.summary: All booking-side fixes complete. Netty OWASP finding root-caused to stale cloud-sdk-aws POM in local Maven repo.
entries.detail:
Final status:
- BUILD SUCCESS: mvn clean verify -pl booking -am (984 unit + 149 integration tests, 0 failures)
- Runtime startup: PASS (no more AwsRegionProvider error with commons 1.0.25-SNAPSHOT)
- WireMock fix: switched wiremock → wiremock-jetty12:3.5.4 for Jetty 12 compatibility
- Integration test fix: Added CallerRunsPolicy to outbound executor in test/PR config
- CollectionUtils SDK v1 refs: Removed from OutboundServiceImpl and MigrationLogic
- OWASP Netty finding: Root cause is stale installed cloud-sdk-aws-1.0.25-SNAPSHOT.pom missing 2 netty-nio-client exclusions (cloud-sdk-api, amazon-sqs-java-extended-client-lib). Fix: rebuild commons with mvn clean install -DskipTests, then rebuild booking.
- Documentation updated: booking/docs/2026-05-27-dw-jetty-upgrade-issues.md
